items.html: After that, it returned to being Matei in Keter, and then not Matei in Hochma and Bina since they both rise there. It is also not Matei in Hesed because it rose to Bina and it is Matei in Gevura. At that time, it is not Matei in Tifferet, and then it is Matei in Netzah, and not Matei in Hod. Then the Hod turned its anterior and gives the two lights to Yesod, and then it is Matei in Yesod. Then Yesod turns its anterior and shines to Malchut, etc., in all the VAK.
